message:
perf(render,text): add #[inline] to hot-path accessors (bd-1o91x)

Annotate 4 methods with #[inline] for cross-crate inlining:
- Buffer::dirty_row_count, Buffer::dirty_span_config (ftui-render)
- Line::width, Text::width (ftui-text)

These are small accessor/computed methods called frequently in
rendering and layout loops, consistent with sibling methods that
already have #[inline].

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
